title: Grey Bunny Rabbit Plush Soft Toy - Build your own Teddy Bear Making Kit - no sew - Easter Gift - 10"/25cm
features: Make this lovely soft bunny at home. This is a no-sew kit anyone can make.

This flopsy bunny comes unstuffed. It is very easy to make and its arms and legs are already filled. You will need to stuff the head and body. Also in this kit is : a 50g bag of 100% recycled super soft stuffing, wishing heart, Splodge Teddy certificate, Splodge Bear colour-in bag, instructions.

Specially designed plush skin with pouch for easy stuffing and easy to seal fastenings - no sewing. The pouch is sealed with a cable tie which is pushed inside the bear. The opening is then sealed with velcro.
Label contains CE certification. Bear measures about 10 inches (25cm) from head to heel.
This bunny makes a great gift for Christmas, Easter and birthdays. Or buy several for a children's make a bear party.
